# ReAct Memory ToolResult profiles

These fixtures are desensitized representatives of the result shapes observed for the real
tools named in the META initialization trace audit (`run_b6ab0e6f76d343e3bc495e219cf76cc4`)
and cross-checked against the current provider contracts.

They intentionally preserve structure rather than real market values or source text. Tests use
them to verify policy selection, structural locators, parent context, EvidenceRef linkage, and
exact block reads. Large-size behavior is generated deterministically inside tests so the repo
does not carry multi-megabyte fixtures.
